title: BEM-617 hourly safe selftest
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
tmp=Path('governance/tmp'); tmp.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

renderer=Path('scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py')
recorder=Path('scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py')
workflow=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
checks=[]
for name,path in [('renderer',renderer),('recorder',recorder),('workflow',workflow)]:
    checks.append({'name':name+'_exists','pass':path.exists(),'path':str(path)})

for name,path in [('renderer',renderer),('recorder',recorder)]:
    ok=False
    err=None
    if path.exists():
        try:
            compile(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), str(path), 'exec')
            ok=True
        except:
            err='syntax_compile_failed'
    checks.append({'name':name+'_syntax_compile','pass':ok,'error':err})

renderer_text=renderer.read_text(errors='ignore') if renderer.exists() else ''
workflow_text=workflow.read_text(errors='ignore') if workflow.exists() else ''
recorder_text=recorder.read_text(errors='ignore') if recorder.exists() else ''
required_renderer=['BEM-HOURLY','Этап:','Дорожная карта:','Чек-лист:','Мониторинг:','Provider route','Основной контур','Резервный контур','Telegram delivery','Blocker','Следующее действие']
for item in required_renderer:
    checks.append({'name':'renderer_source_contains_'+item,'pass':item in renderer_text})
checks.append({'name':'workflow_has_allowed_schedule','pass':'schedule:' in workflow_text and "cron: '0 * * * *'" in workflow_text})
checks.append({'name':'workflow_no_inline_python_heredoc','pass':"<<'PY'" not in workflow_text and '<<PY' not in workflow_text})
checks.append({'name':'workflow_uses_renderer_and_recorder','pass':'scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py' in workflow_text and 'scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py' in workflow_text})
checks.append({'name':'workflow_commit_conflict_safe','pass':'git diff --cached --quiet' in workflow_text and '--autostash' in workflow_text})
checks.append({'name':'recorder_updates_delivery','pass':'telegram_delivery' in recorder_text and 'curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt' in recorder_text})

schedule_files=[]
for p in list(Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yml'))+list(Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yaml')):
    if 'schedule:' in p.read_text(errors='ignore'):
        schedule_files.append(str(p))
checks.append({'name':'schedule_only_curator_hourly','pass':schedule_files==['.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'],'schedule_files':schedule_files})

sample=sep.join(['BEM-HOURLY | SYSTEM MONITORING REPORT | workflow_runtime','','Этап: 4/6 (67%)','Дорожная карта: 4/6 (67%)','','Чек-лист:','✅ Роли/контуры проверены','✅ Provider gate выполнен: true','✅ Последние события собраны: 5','✅ Telegram delivery проверяется этим workflow','✅ Blocker: null','','Мониторинг:','• Текущий этап','  Описание: canonical_renderer_implemented','  Обоснование: Показывает, на каком участке roadmap находится система.','• Provider route','  Описание: selected=gpt_reserve; reserve_used=true','  Обоснование: Если Claude primary не доказан, система фиксирует fallback.','• Основной контур','  Описание: Claude Code primary = not selected or not proven','  Обоснование: Отчёт явно показывает, сработал ли основной provider.','• Резервный контур','  Описание: GPT reserve = used','  Обоснование: Fallback фиксируется без имитации PASS.','• Следующее действие','  Описание: finish BEM-605 execution, selftest, monitoring report','  Обоснование: Roadmap продолжается без ожидания отчёта.'])+sep
sample_path=tmp/'curator_hourly_report_message_static_selftest.txt'
sample_path.write_text(sample,encoding='utf-8')
checks.append({'name':'sample_no_wide_pipe_table','pass':'|---' not in sample and sample.count('|') < 5})

all_pass=all(x.get('pass') for x in checks)
status='pass' if all_pass else 'failed'
blocker=None if all_pass else {'code':'HOURLY_REPORT_STATIC_SELFTEST_FAILED','failed':[x for x in checks if not x.get('pass')]}
selftest={'schema_version':'hourly_report_static_selftest.v1','selftest_id':'bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe','status':status,'checks':checks,'sample_message_file':str(sample_path),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:49 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(selftest,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-617 | Hourly Report Static Selftest Safe | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:49 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x.get('pass') else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Sample preview'+sep+'```text'+sep+sample+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe','cycle_id':'bem617-hourly-report-static-selftest-safe','source':'gpt_executor_reserve','status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'sample_message':str(sample_path),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:49 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        state={}
state['bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'sample_message':str(sample_path),'blocker':blocker}
state['hourly_report_template_flow']='static_selftest_'+status
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:49 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-617 '+status.upper()+': hourly report static selftest completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof),str(sample_path)])
ops_applied.append('Ran hourly report static selftest without exec or Exception as e')
"""
No issue comments.
